results.Author: Alex Kim
results.Preview: Renewal sync with Summit Trail Software covering the FY2026 license renewal quote requested under case CAS-260134. Jae Park confirmed budget approval and asked for the remote configuration service pack to be itemized separately on the final quote. Action: send the revised renewal agreement for signature before the expiration date.
results.Title: Summit Trail Renewal Sync

results.Author: Riley Chen
results.Preview: Quarterly service review at the Erie plant. Walked through the line three unplanned downtime postmortem for case CAS-260132 and confirmed the spindle-adjacent label printers are now on the quarterly preventive maintenance rotation under the active SOW. Tom Okafor asked for vibration readings to be attached to future visit reports.
results.Title: Granite Peak Quarterly Service Review

results.Author: Casey Rivera
results.Preview: Escalation standup for the produce section cold chain temperature excursion, case CAS-260133, with the related aisle four refrigeration alarm CAS-260138 reviewed in the same session. Sensor alert thresholds were retuned and Rosa Delgado will receive the weekly exception report going forward. Follow-up visit scheduled for the Tacoma store.
results.Title: Harbor Lights Cold Chain Escalation Standup

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Pipeline review of the Riverbend Medical Group managed print fleet refresh opportunity. Deal was closed lost this cycle; clinic leadership deferred capital spend while the prior authorization SLA issue in case CAS-260124 remains open, and Priya Natarajan asked to revisit next quarter. Action: keep the fleet assessment current and re-engage after case closure.
results.Title: Riverbend Print Fleet Opportunity Review

results.Author: Jamie Ortiz
results.Preview: Working session with grid operations on the substation feeder fault flagged in the telemetry export, case CAS-260128. Elena Vasquez walked through the export format and the team mapped which sensor kit fields feed the district dashboards. The draft sensor deployment SOW will add an export integration test before signature.
results.Title: Prairie Wind Telemetry Working Session

results.Author: Jordan Lee
results.Preview: Debrief on document support for the disputed card transaction investigation, case CAS-260126. Marcus Webb confirmed the chain-of-custody terms in the master services agreement cover the statement reprints requested by the member services team. Action: deliver certified copies within the audit-support turnaround in the MSA.
results.Title: Bluegrass Dispute Handling Debrief

results.Author: Morgan Ellis
results.Preview: Monthly check-in with the city permit office. The building permit application backlog in case CAS-260130 is driving higher plan-set printing volumes than the current managed print agreement forecast, which strengthens the renewal case Dana Whitfield is taking to council. Action: prepare a volume-tier comparison for the renewal packet.
results.Title: Alder Creek Permit Portal Check-in

results.Author: Taylor Brooks
results.Preview: Weekly pipeline review across open opportunities. Cedar Hollow Printing managed print fleet refresh and Blue Heron Stationery preventive maintenance program both advanced to the propose stage, while the Willow Brook Legal office sensor deployment is holding at develop pending a floor survey. Action: schedule the Willow Brook survey and refresh close dates on all three.
results.Title: Sales Pipeline Review Week Two

results.Author: Sam Patel
results.Preview: Preparation session for the resubmission of the grant drawdown report rejected for a missing form, case CAS-260136. Samuel Greer confirmed the corrected form list and the task order agreement language now names the reporting support deliverables explicitly. Action: route the updated task order draft to agency review this week.
results.Title: Federal Plaza Grant Reporting Prep

results.Author: Casey Rivera
results.Preview: Support huddle on the open enrollment benefits portal login failures at Lakeview University, case CAS-260137. Harper Lindqvist reported the failure spike aligns with the enrollment window close and asked for extended support coverage through the deadline. Action: staff extra support hours and share the known-issues workaround list.
results.Title: Lakeview Open Enrollment Support Huddle
